posts.author: Denner (denner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Aplicativo móvel deveria ter uma funação para edição de Mondaydoc.

What are you trying to achieve

Enabling mondaydocs editing for Android and iOS mobile apps would be incredibly efficient. Sometimes my team needs to make edits on their phones because they’re not near a PC. However, this feature isn’t just for reading; they end up having to use other platforms to do so.
